title: Brutal Sandton hit-and-run caught on video: Suspect not yet arrested
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - A disturbing video circulating on social media depicts a tragic incident in Rivonia, Sandton, on 13th Avenue on 5 April.

Sandton Chronicle reports that in the video, a victim is seen being driven over several times and fatally injured in what appears to be a deliberate act.

The vehicle involved was a grey Ford Ranger, which fled the scene immediately after the impact.


> Case of murder opened


According to police spokesperson Colonel Dimakatso Nevhuhulwi, police received a complaint about the incident and found a man lying on the roadside with injuries.

“The paramedics declared him dead on the scene. According to information at hand, the victim reportedly argued with the shop owner and allegedly hit the shop owner’s vehicle with a brick, breaking the windscreen. The shop owner reportedly came out and drove over his body several times before fleeing the scene,” says Nevhuhulwi.

A case of murder has been opened for further investigation, and no one has been arrested yet.

A manhunt has been launched to identify and apprehend the suspect.


> A message from the Sandton Community Policing Forum (CPF) reads: “Sandton SAPS and Sandton CPF are requesting assistance from the community on the whereabouts of a suspect allegedly linked to a murder in Sandton recently.”


The suspect was last seen driving a grey Ford Ranger in the Sophiatown area, which has since been abandoned.

Anyone with information is urged to contact Constable Ndou at Sandton SAPS on 076 416 5664.

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
